text:
Garden Hose pipe is a flexible tube used to convey water.
There are a number of common attachments available for the end of the hose, such as sprayers and sprinklers (which are used to concentrate water at one point or spread it over a large area).
Garden hose pipe is ideally suited to unlimited applications in a wide range of industries where low pressure work is required for conveyance of water, gardening and other everyday application.

Eagle Cliff Falls plunges over the edge of the rocks and downstream into Havana Glen.
Fall has settled into Havana Glen and Eagle Cliff Falls looks spectacular when framed against the beautiful autumn display.
Photo © copyright by Thomas Mangan.

Former Farro Fresh's marketing manager, Ahi McKenzie, has been named as Foodstuffs' new external relations manager.
Before Farro, she has been head of marketing and design at The Aromatherapy Company.
McKenzie will be working across both Foodstuffs companies, Foodstuffs North Island and Foodstuffs South Island.

Write a page of interior monologue.
Write a page of short sentences, each sentence no longer than seven words.
Write a sentence three hundred words long.

Buzz is beginning to grow about Google's plans for a rolling, significant overhaul of how we experience search.
Below are the latest pieces which covered the release of semantic search details last week.
It's worth noting how these changes might affect rankings and traffic from the search giant in the future.

Wash your tatties and cut into orange segments.
Do not peel them as the skin is full of nutritious goodness.
Put them in a bowl and slather them with dark soy sauce.
Leave them for a while, stirring occasionally.
Place them on a baking tray, skin down, with shallots and garlic cloves - they need a bit of olive oil.
Roast until they are nicely cooked.
They will be brown and crisp with fluffy interiors - a bit like me.

This remarkable edition of numbered copies collects the best work of a leading contemporary Hungarian poet.
A sensual presentation designed by the author, with full-color illustrations, French flaps, colored endpapers, and high-quality paper.
dangled its raw poverty into the world.
- from "Suffering Set Me on the Road"

Kick off your festive season with Handel's Messiah in St.Catharines' very own Partridge Hall.
Experience Chorus Niagara's stirring Hallelujah Chorus as heard by over million people on YouTube, and delight in brilliant soloists who thrill with dazzling arias in this holiday classic.
One performance only!
Players: CHORUS NIAGARA, Talisker Players, Jacqueline Woodley, soprano; Stephanie Tritchew, mezzo-soprano; Asitha Tennekoon, tenor; Clarence Frazer, baritone.

London Evening Standard - The New Optimism: How You Can Be Happy Robert Holden, Ph.D.
Psychiatrists used to study misery.
Then one day Martin Seligman, the (now very wealthy) father of the positive psychology movement, had the bright idea of turning things on their heads.
Rather than study unhappy people, he thought, why not look at happy people?
